overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a gothic library interior with high vaulted stone ceilings. Students in wizard robes sit at wooden tables studying, surrounded by ornate iron chandeliers and stone archways in a dimly lit, atmospheric academic setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic library study hall with reading tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the library interior and students studying

notable_agents.action: student in robes sitting at wooden table, reading a book and occasionally turning pages
student in blue robes standing near the back archway, stationary

entered.detail: high ornate stone ceiling with ribbed arches and dark wooden beams
large wrought iron chandelier hanging from ceiling with multiple candle-style lights
long dark wooden table with stacked books and papers where students are seated
ornate blue and gold patterned carpet running down the center of the hall
large gothic stone arch with carved details leading to another section
matching gothic stone arch on the right side of the hall
tall dark wooden bookshelves lining the left wall filled with books

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a grand gothic library interior with soaring stone vaults and iron chandeliers. In the foreground right, a student in robes reads at a wooden table, while another student stands in the distant center near a stone archway. The space features ornate rugs, wooden furniture, and bookshelves along the stone walls, creating an atmospheric academic environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary, cinematic perspective of a grand gothic library, capturing a still and atmospheric academic environment. It begins with a wide view of the soaring stone vaults and ornate iron chandeliers that define the cavernous space. The focus settles on a student in robes reading at a wooden table in the foreground right, while the depth of the room reveals another student standing near a distant stone archway. The scene remains poised, emphasizing the stillness of the ornate rugs and bookshelves lining the stone walls under the dim, moody lighting.
